title: Lagging Strand
summary: The strand that must be synthesized away from the structures/replication-fork|replication fork because of the 5' → 3' rule. To accomplish this, the lagging strand is built in short pieces called structures/okazaki-fragment|Okazaki fragments. Each fragment requires its own RNA primer (laid down by enzymes/rna-primase); enzymes/dna-polymerase-i later replaces those primers with DNA, and enzymes/dna-
